content.text:
I'm sorry, it looks like I'm currently experiencing a technical issue with the news tool — it seems a required module isn't available on the backend right now. This is something that would need to be resolved on the system/server side.

Here are a few alternatives you can use to get the latest US headlines:

- 🗞️ **[Google News (US)](https://news.google.com/topstories?hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en)**
- 📰 **[Reuters](https://www.reuters.com/)**
- 📺 **[CNN](https://www.cnn.com/)**
- 🦅 **[AP News](https://apnews.com/)**
- 📡 **[NPR News](https://www.npr.org/sections/news/)**

I apologize for the inconvenience! Is there anything else I can help you with?
